info.title: SQLite Cache Command Line Tool
info.description: Creates table and indexes in SQLite database to be used for distributed caching

commands.name: create
commands.description:
Creates table and indexes in SQLite database to be used for
distributed caching

arguments.name: CONNECTIONSTRING
arguments.description: The connection string to connect to the database.

arguments.name: TABLENAME
arguments.description: Name of the table to be created.
